name: axis_handshake_buffer
core_function: Ready/valid one-word skid or pipeline buffer for AXI-stream-like data paths.
algorithm: Input transfers occur only when s_axis_tvalid and s_axis_tready are high on the same rising clock edge.
structure: A transfer occurs only when valid and ready are both high on the same clock edge.
Hold tdata stable while tvalid is high and tready is low.
Compute input ready from output ready or buffer vacancy.
Use skid storage when downstream ready can deassert late.
